subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-13
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! This is an illuminating gathering. The faces are brilliant
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ظهور مظاهر مقدسه بهار الهی است اراضی قلوب را سبز
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @spiritual transformation, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds
